name: ExtensionCommunicationRequest_InformationProvider
title: R5: Who should share the information
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `CommunicationRequest.informationProvider` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`CommunicationRequest.informationProvider` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/PractitionerRole,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/RelatedPerson,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/HealthcareService,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Endpoint)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `CommunicationRequest.informationProvider` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/PractitionerRole,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/RelatedPerson,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/HealthcareService,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Endpoint)`
*  R4B: `CommunicationRequest.sender` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/PractitionerRole,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/RelatedPerson,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/HealthcareService)`
*  R4: `CommunicationRequest.sender` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/PractitionerRole,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/RelatedPerson,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/HealthcareService)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `CommunicationRequest.informationProvider` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `CommunicationRequest.informationProvider` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CommunicationRequest.sender` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The standard extension `alternate-reference` has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `CommunicationRequest.informationProvider` with unmapped reference targets: Endpoint.

element.short: R5: Who should share the information
element.comment:
Element `CommunicationRequest.informationProvider` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `CommunicationRequest.informationProvider` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CommunicationRequest.sender` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The standard extension `alternate-reference` has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `CommunicationRequest.informationProvider` with unmapped reference targets: Endpoint.

element.definition: The entity (e.g. person, organization, clinical information system, or device) which is to be the source of the communication.
